commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 11:14 And they set themselves in the midst of that plot, and delivered it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved them by a great deliverance. Septuagint speak only of one: "And he stood", (Haydock) and the verbs are singular, 2 Kings xxiii. Hebrew vayahas (ibid. ) is more correct than vayosha, "saved. "(Kennicott) Protestants are forced to add, "saved them by a great deliverance. "But there is nothing in the original signifying by.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
